arts.ttl: Aston Villa react to 'strange' development as Newcastle United diehards all say the same thing
arts.sum: Twelve months on, Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins felt the decision to disallow Rogers' goal was'soft' while Emery initially thought the referee gave it 'but when he changed, I was thinking it was strange'. Unai Emery has bemoaned a VAR decision that cost his Aston Villa side a famous Champions League win - and it has brought back some painful memories for Newcastle United fans.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United facing unusual St James' Park challenge ahead of Liverpool
arts.sum: For the second time this season, United failed to score on home turf in the Premier League. Newcastle have scored just five Premier League goals in their six home games this season, and only found the net twice in the same game on one occasion.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United in 'extensive process' as club prepare new stadium proposals
arts.sum: That is something Howe is acutely aware of and feels the difference between facing West Ham at Upton Park to the London Stadium, where Newcastle have a fine record, is there for all to see. Eddie Howe believes that West Ham's move from Upton Park to the London Stadium is a good example of weighing up the pros and cons of staying or leaving St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Your Palace FPL picks for Gameweeks 13-15
arts.sum: The Premier League is gearing up for the busy Christmas period, which presents a puzzle not only for the managers on the touchline, but also for Fantasy managers alike.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Newcastle predictions: Selhurst set for an exciting encounter
arts.sum: Goals have been a common them in recent games involving Crystal Palace and Newcastle and Jamie Griffith is expecting more of the same at Selhurst Park on Saturday
